Class SetupScreen

java.lang.Object
ui.BaseScreen
ui.SetupScreen
public class SetupScreen extends BaseScreen
First-run screen where the user defines their budget cycle.

Collects a total allowance and a start/end date range, validates the inputs, then delegates to App.initializeCycle(double, LocalDate, LocalDate) before navigating to the dashboard.

      public SetupScreen(App app)
      Constructs the SetupScreen.
      Parameters:
      app - the central application controller

  • Method Details

    • initComponents

      protected void initComponents()
      Initialises all UI components (fields, buttons, labels, etc.). Called before BaseScreen.initLayout().
      Specified by:
      initComponents in class BaseScreen

    • initLayout

      protected void initLayout()
      Arranges the initialised components into the BaseScreen.panel hierarchy. Called after BaseScreen.initComponents().
      Specified by:
      initLayout in class BaseScreen

    • buildDatePanel

      private JPanel buildDatePanel(JSpinner day, JSpinner month, JSpinner year)
      Builds a compact inline date panel with day / month / year spinners separated by slash labels.
      Parameters:
      day - spinner for the day component (1–31)
      month - spinner for the month component (1–12)
      year - spinner for the year component
      Returns:
      the assembled date panel

    • onStartCycleClicked

      public void onStartCycleClicked()
      Handles the "Start cycle" button click. Validates inputs and, if valid, creates the cycle and navigates to the dashboard.

    • validateInputs

      public boolean validateInputs()
      Validates all user inputs before cycle creation. Displays an appropriate error message and returns false if any check fails.
      Returns:
      true if all inputs are valid, false otherwise

    • showError

      public void showError(String message)
      Displays a validation error message below the form.
      Parameters:
      message - the error text to show

    • navigateToDashboard

      public void navigateToDashboard()
      Navigates to the dashboard screen.
